infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Salty uses your location to show events happening near you.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Salty uses your camera to scan ticket photos.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Salty needs access to your photos to scan tickets and set a profile picture.
infoPlist.NSCalendarsUsageDescription: Salty reads your calendar to find concerts, games, and shows you're attending.
infoPlist.NSRemindersUsageDescription: Salty may access reminders to help track your events.

plugins.contactsPermission: Salty uses your contacts to help you find friends on the app.

plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: Salty uses your location to show events happening near you.

plugins.photosPermission: Salty needs access to your photos to scan tickets and set a profile picture.
plugins.cameraPermission: Salty uses your camera to scan ticket photos.

plugins.calendarPermission: Salty reads your calendar to find concerts, games, and shows you're attending.
